questions.q: What is the purpose of using try and catch block in exception handling in Java?
questions.answer: To handle and manage runtime errors in Java

questions.q: Write a Java code snippet that demonstrates how to read a file using FileInputStream class.
What is the difference between FileWriter and BufferedWriter in Java?
questions.answer: FileWriter is used for writing character data whereas BufferedWriter is used for buffered character output streams.

questions.q: Which Java class is used to read primitive data types from a file?
How do you check if a file exists in Java using File class?
questions.answer: Using the exists() method of the File class.

questions.q: What is the purpose of using append mode in File writing in Java?
questions.answer: To add data to the end of a file without deleting the existing data.

questions.q: Write a Java code snippet that demonstrates how to delete a file using File class.
Which Java class is used to read and write objects to a file?
What is the difference between File and FileReader in Java?
questions.answer: File is used to represent a file or directory whereas FileReader is used to read character files.

questions.q: How do you create a temporary file in Java using File class?
questions.answer: Using the createTempFile() method of the File class.
